sections.paragraph:
ἰσχύω [ἰσχύς] ‘have capacity for accomplishing’, have power/strength, be able

—a. of ability to cope Mt 8:28; 9:12; Mk 14:37; Ac 6:10; 19:16; Phil 4:13 (‘I can cope with anything’).

—b. of ability to achieve an objective Mt 5:13 (salt and its properties); Lk 6:48; 13:24; J 21:6; Ac 15:10; Rv 12:8. πολὺ ἰσχύει bears much weight Js 5:16. W. legal connotation be in force Hb 9:17; cp. τι ἰσχύει be of significance Gal 5:6.
